ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR, TE) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6'2") */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in lbs) */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "team1" TEXT /* First team playing in the game */,
  "team2" TEXT /* Second team playing in the game */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Regular Season, Playoffs, Super Bowl) */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the game was played in */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week the game was played in */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium the game was played at */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "gs" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "cmp" INTEGER /* Number of completed passes */,
  "att" INTEGER /* Number of attempted passes */,
  "yds" INTEGER /* Number of passing yards */,
  "int" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "att_rush" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "yds_rush" INTEGER /* Number of rushing yards */,
  "rec" INTEGER /* Number of receptions */,
  "yds_rec" INTEGER /* Number of receiving yards */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost */,
  "tds" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns */,
  "tds_rush" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  "tds_rec" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns */,
  "lng" INTEGER /* Longest play (passing) */,
  "lng_rush" INTEGER /* Longest play (rushing) */,
  "lng_rec" INTEGER /* Longest play (receiving) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team is based in */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the team is based in */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium the team plays at */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Quarterback, Running Back) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the position (e.g., QB, RB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_points" (
  "fp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy point record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "fp" REAL /* Total fantasy points earned by the player in the game */,
  "fp_passing" REAL /* Fantasy points earned by the player from passing */,
  "fp_rushing" REAL /* Fantasy points earned by the player from rushing */,
  "fp_receiving" REAL /* Fantasy points earned by the player from receiving */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle, concussion) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive, out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., season, postseason) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "contract_year" INTEGER /* Year the contract was signed */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the contract (in millions) */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract (in years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
